name: drydock
description: Idea-to-launch product pipeline for Claude Code — 19 agents take a product from architecture, UX, and API contracts through tested code, security, CI/CD, and compliance to ship, then go-to-market (marketing, sales, customer success).

plugins.name: drydock
plugins.description: Transforms Claude Code from raw code generation into a full idea-to-launch product system. 19 specialized agents cover architecture, API-first contracts, UX design, tested backend/frontend, observability, security-by-default, CI/CD hardening, automated testing, performance budgets, feature flags, regulatory compliance, and go-to-market (marketing, sales, customer success) — from idea to launch.
